# DPD Connect — PrestaShop 8 Shipping Module

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED:START - Do not edit manually -->

**Module name**: `dpdconnect`
**Version**: 2.1
**License**: GPL-3.0-or-later
**Author**: DPD Nederland B.V.
**Compatibility**: PrestaShop 1.7 (PHP 7.1) & PrestaShop 8 (PHP 8.1+)

## Overview

The DPD Connect module integrates PrestaShop with the DPD shipping carrier API. It enables shop operators to:

- Authenticate with the DPD Connect API using encrypted credentials and JWT tokens
- Automatically create and manage DPD shipping carriers in the PrestaShop back office
- Generate shipping labels (regular, return, Saturday) directly from the order list
- Process label generation asynchronously via a batch/job queue
- Display parcel shop locators at checkout
- Support Fresh & Freeze temperature-controlled shipping products
- Generate printable shipping lists (PDF)
- Store customs data per product (HS code, country of origin, customs value, age check)
